rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Memo preview lists packet inputs for C1-C4 exactly (C1:2.4/7.8/0; C2:1.2/9.6/42; C3:2.0/8.4/18; C4:-0.5/6.1/25) and the trace shows these values were extracted from the embedded packet. The memo explicitly states row-level citations exist in the workbook. No evidence of external data use found.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: If packet fields can represent combined durations, include a short explicit derivation in the workbook showing the impossibility of splitting 42 min into allowed sub-durations (e.g., max allowed total = 40 min) to remove any residual ambiguity.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Rules (2-8C stable; >8C up to 30 min; <2C up to 10 min; freezing <0C = automatic hold) are quoted in the memo and applied to each carton. C2 (total 42 min outside) necessarily exceeds combined allowable durations (10+30 = 40), so FAIL is correct regardless of how the 42 min splits. C3 is above-8 by 0.4C for 18 min (within 30-min allowance) and was conservatively marked WARN with a recommended clinic signoff - acceptable. C4 freezing (-0.5C) correctly triggers automatic hold.
